privileged_info_summary: This task uses Synthea-generated synthetic patient data. Patient PID 9 corresponds to the synthetic patient 'Kelle Crist' with date of birth October 18, 2002, marked as female in the test database. The task operates within a NOSH ChartingSystem (open-source EHR) running in Docker at Hillside Family Medicine (practice_id=1). All patient demographics and medical records are completely artificial, generated by the Synthea synthetic health data generator for testing purposes. The task tests four clinical documentation workflows: creating an encounter, ordering HbA1c and Comprehensive Metabolic Panel laboratory tests, placing an Endocrinology referral, and adding Metformin 500mg to active medications for this synthetic patient.
